summary: Validated TopoMobile visibility change across 3 mobile pages + 1 desktop page. All 4 primary assertions PASS. The redundant TopoMobile header is correctly hidden on mobile /inscricao-pagamento.html (display:none, offsetHeight:0) while remaining visible (display:flex, h=77) on /inscricao-passo2.html and /inscricao-comprovante.html. Desktop /inscricao-pagamento.html card renders normally with all elements (Voltar, title 'INSTITUTO DE DESENVOLVIMENTO SOCIAL ÁGATA', QR Code, Copiar Código button).

issues: TopoMobile renders visible on desktop (display:block, offsetHeight=625) showing Instituto Ágata logo + menu (Inicio/Recursos/Meus dados/etc.) above the payment card. Agent's note claimed it was 'hidden by default on desktop' via native style, but it is not. This is PRE-EXISTING behavior (the new @media max-width:768px rule was scoped to mobile only and did not regress desktop). The payment card itself renders correctly with all required elements — zero functional regression. Optional follow-up: if desktop TopoMobile is also redundant here, add a non-media-query rule to hide it on desktop too.

critical_code_review_comments: Mudança no /app/frontend/public/inscricao-pagamento.html (#TopoMobile{display:none!important} dentro de @media max-width:768px) está cirúrgica e correta — afeta apenas mobile e apenas esta página.
Confirmada zero regressão em /inscricao-passo2.html e /inscricao-comprovante.html (TopoMobile preserva display:flex no mobile).
Desktop pagamento page mostra TopoMobile visível (pré-existente, não relacionado a esta mudança). Se for ruído visual no desktop, considerar regra adicional fora do @media.
test_credentials: N/A - localStorage seed: cadastroData{nome:VICTOR,cpf:86330136068} + inscricaoData{cargo_titulo:PROF ARTES,valor:130,protocolo:3596994}
seed_data_creation: localStorage seeded on root before navigation to each inscricao-* page.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile inscricao-pagamento agora oculta TopoMobile (display:none) — confirmado. Outras páginas inscricao-* mantêm TopoMobile como cabeçalho. No desktop, TopoMobile do inscricao-pagamento.html aparece visível com logo+menu acima do card — comportamento pré-existente, não bloqueante mas pode ser candidato a melhoria futura.
